title: chore(deps): update dependency inquirer to v6
body:

|---|---|---|---|---|
| inquirer | devDependencies | major | `5.2.0` -> `6.2.2` | [source](https://togithub.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js) |

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>SBoudrias/Inquirer.js</summary>

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/inquirer@6.1.0...inquirer@6.2.0)

### [`v6.1.0`](https://togithub.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v6.0.0...inquirer@6.1.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v6.0.0...inquirer@6.1.0)

### [`v6.0.0`](https://togithub.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/releases/v6.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/SBoudrias/Inquirer.js/compare/v5.2.0...v6.0.0)

##### Breaking

-   Update to Rx.js v6

##### New features

-   New prompt type `number`.
-   `transformer` option now receive `{ isFinal }` as a flag to allow transforming the final answer differently.
-   Use `name` as default message if `message` isn't provided.
-   Hide default values for `password` prompt.

</details>
